name: Coconut Fried Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 8 scoops of the ice cream on a baking sheet, and freeze at least 1 hour or until firm.
2. Combine eggs and vanilla; divide mixture in half. Cover half of egg mixture, and chill.
3. Combine cookie crumbs and coconut; divide mixture in half.
4. Dip each ice-cream ball into half of egg mixture, and dredge in half of crumb mixture. Place on baking sheet, and freeze at least 1 hour or until firm.
5. Remove from freezer; dip in remaining chilled egg mixture, and dredge in remaining crumb mixture. Return to baking sheet; cover and freeze several hours or until firm.
6. Pour oil to a depth of 3 inches into a Dutch oven. Heat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Fry ice cream balls in the oil for 30 seconds or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels, and serve immediately. Makes 8 servings.
